code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut has = false
mut max_val = 0
mut in_num = false
mut neg = false
mut cur = 0
mut started = false

while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
  let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43

  if is_digit
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      neg = false
      cur = 0
    end
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    started = true
  else if is_sign and not in_num
    in_num = true
    neg = b == 45
    cur = 0
    started = false
  else
    if in_num and started
      let v = if neg
        -cur
      else
        cur
      end
      if v > 0
        if not has
          has = true
          max_val = v
        else if v > max_val
          max_val = v
        end
      end
    end
    in_num = false
    neg = false
    cur = 0
    started = false
  end

  i = i + 1
end

if has
  println("max=#{max_val}")
else
  println("none")
end
